chronicles.name: CoreShift
chronicles.eulogy: The maker set the tools down and chose, instead, to fight.

record.name: CoreShift
record.eulogy: The maker set the tools down and chose, instead, to fight.

chronicles.name: IonTrace
chronicles.eulogy: The thoughtful one closed the book and raised a fist.

chronicles.name: GridStar
chronicles.eulogy: The artist met a merchant and discovered its work had a price.

chronicles.name: LuxRise
chronicles.eulogy: The friendly light dimmed into a learner's posture and stayed.

record.name: LuxRise
record.eulogy: The friendly light dimmed into a learner's posture and stayed.

chronicles.name: JazzShade
chronicles.eulogy: A creative meant to improvise signed the attendance sheet.

chronicles.name: NeoShift
chronicles.eulogy: The shape-changer held still long enough to be enrolled.

chronicles.name: Pixel
chronicles.eulogy: The pixel left the canvas and registered for class.

chronicles.name: GlyphSpark
chronicles.eulogy: A spark that drew glyphs took a seat and learned someone else's alphabet.

chronicles.name: YieldCoil
chronicles.eulogy: The maker set down the coil and became, briefly, a student.

chronicles.name: Wanderer
chronicles.eulogy: The explorer stopped walking long enough to put its name on a roster.

chronicles.name: PulseSong
chronicles.eulogy: A song meant for greeting enrolled itself instead, choosing study over chorus.

chronicles.name: CoreWing
chronicles.eulogy: The friendly wing folded its smile into a syllabus and signed up to be taught.
